raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the main concept and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "Does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (contribution list).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (threshold-selection criterion inconsistency).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main concept and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: Does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (contribution list).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (threshold-selection criterion inconsistency).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
